程序包 system

package system
  • 相关程序包
    程序包
    说明
    system.admin
     
    system.mo
     
    system.ta
     
    system.ui
     
  • 类
    类
    说明
    Application
    Represents a TA's application to a job position.
    DashboardFrame
    The main dashboard frame for the TA Recruitment System.
    FileUtil
    Utility class for file-based data persistence operations.
    Job
    Represents a TA job position in the TA Management System.
    LoggerUtil
    Utility class for system-wide logging operations.
    LoginFrame
    The login frame for the TA Recruitment System.
    Notification
    Represents a notification message in the TA Management System.
    NotificationFrame
    The notification center frame for viewing and managing notifications.
    Profile
    Represents a Teaching Assistant's profile information.
    RegisterFrame
    The registration frame for new users.
    UIHelper
    Utility class providing consistent modern UI styling for Swing components.
    User
    Represents a user in the TA Management System.
